headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) After Its 82% One-Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Interactive Brokers Group is still attractively priced after its strong run, the valuation picture is more mixed than the share chart might suggest. The stock last closed at US$83.71, with returns of 5.3% over 7 days, 22.9% over 30 days, 24.5% year to date and 82.4% over the past year, as well as 348.6% over 3 years and 410.9% over 5 years. Recent price action has been in the spotlight as investors react to ongoing developments around market activity and trading...
